title: sieve_glob_to_regex runs before every cache lookup
description: str_matches_glob calls sieve_glob_to_regex(pattern) unconditionally, allocating a new String on every glob match attempt, then passes that string as the cache key to str_matches_regex_pat. The cache lookup is hot-path correct, but the key construction cost (String allocation + regex translation) is paid even on a cache hit. Caching by the original glob pattern string, or pre-translating during compile, would eliminate this per-match allocation — expected impact: one String allocation eliminated per :matches test application.
